title: Aesthetic Clinic Manager
description:
Clinic Manager

Role Overview

The Clinic Manager oversees daily clinic operations while actively driving sales performance, service excellence, and team development. This role is client-facing and hands-on, ensuring every patient experience reflects standards of professionalism, care, and precision.

Key Responsibilities

Client Experience & Consultations

  • Conduct professional consultations and confidently recommend suitable aesthetic and wellness treatments aligned with client needs and clinic protocols
  • Ensure a seamless, premium client journey from enquiry to post-treatment follow-up
  • Handle client feedback, concerns, and service recovery promptly and professionally

Operations & Clinic Management

  • Support smooth day-to-day operations of the clinic, ensuring workflows, schedules, and resources are well managed
  • Uphold high standards of cleanliness, safety, and MOH-compliant clinic practices
  • Assist in managing inventory, treatment rooms, and front-of-house readiness

Sales & Performance

  • Drive outlet-specific sales targets through effective consultation, follow-ups, and team coaching
  • Track sales performance, identify gaps, and implement action plans to improve conversion and retention
  • Support membership, packages, and promotional initiatives in a compliant and client-centric manner

Team Leadership

  • Lead, motivate, and support a team of therapists to deliver consistent, high-quality service
  • Provide on-the-job guidance, training, and performance feedback
  • Foster a positive, professional, and collaborative team culture aligned with the brand values

Marketing & Campaign Execution

  • Support lead management, follow-ups, and conversion from marketing initiatives (e.g. WhatsApp,events, partnerships)

Continuous Improvement

  • Identify operational or service gaps and propose improvements to enhance efficiency and client satisfaction
  • Perform other duties as assigned to support clinic growth and excellence

Job Requirements

  • Minimum 3 years of management and sales experience in an aesthetic clinic, beauty, or wellness environment
  • Strong sales acumen with a genuine, service-oriented approach
  • Good knowledge of aesthetic treatments, skincare, and clinic equipment (laser, injectables support, facials, etc.)
  • Confident communicator with strong interpersonal and problem-solving skills
  • Organized, proactive, and comfortable in a fast-paced, premium clinic setting

Why Join

  • Be part of a premium, doctor-led aesthetic clinic with a strong focus on personalised care
  • Work in a growing brand that values professionalism, learning, and long-term client relationships
